metadata.title: Terms & Conditions — Remix
metadata.description: Terms and Conditions for Remix Pro and the services operated by Remix Labs UG.

intro.text: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the services, software, and products operated by **Remix Labs, UG** (doing business as Remix) ("Remix", "we", "us", or "our"), including the Remix Pro subscription and AI credit services available at [https://remix.live](https://remix.live) and [https://remix.ethereum.org](https://remix.ethereum.org) (collectively, the "Services").
By accessing or using our Services, or by completing a purchase, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our Services.
**Company details:** Remix Labs, UG · Oranienstrasse 6, 10997 Berlin, Germany · [remix@remixlabs.live](mailto:remix@remixlabs.live)

blocks.text: **Who we are.** Remix Labs, UG is a company registered in Germany, operating the Remix Pro subscription service for developers building on Ethereum and EVM-compatible blockchains.

**Who handles your payments.** All purchases are processed by **Paddle.com** (Paddle), who acts as the Merchant of Record for all transactions. Your payment is made to Paddle, not directly to Remix Labs, UG. Paddle handles billing, invoicing, and sales tax/VAT collection on our behalf.

**What you're buying.** Remix Pro is a subscription service that gives you access to enhanced AI features and dApp hosting within the Remix IDE. You may also purchase AI credit top-ups on a pay-as-you-go basis.
**Subscriptions auto-renew.** Your subscription renews automatically at the end of each billing cycle unless you cancel before the renewal date.
**Refunds.** Monthly subscription fees are generally non-refundable. Full details are in our [Refund Policy](/refundpolicy).
**Governing law.** These Terms are governed by the laws of Germany.

blocks.text: By creating an account, subscribing to Remix Pro, purchasing AI credits, or otherwise accessing our Services, you enter into a legally binding agreement with Remix Labs, UG under these Terms.
You must be at least 18 years of age (or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction) to use the Services. By using the Services, you represent that you meet this requirement.
If you are using the Services on behalf of a company or other legal entity, you represent that you have authority to bind that entity to these Terms.

Remix is an open-source, browser-based IDE for developing, testing, and deploying smart contracts on Ethereum and EVM-compatible blockchains. The core Remix IDE is and will remain free and open source.
**Remix Pro** is an optional paid subscription that unlocks additional capabilities, including:

items: Enhanced RemixAI features powered by large language models
AI code generation, completion, and explanation
dApp hosting and deployment infrastructure
Priority access to new features

blocks.text: We reserve the right to modify, update, or discontinue any feature or aspect of the Services at any time. We will provide reasonable notice of material changes where possible.

The Remix IDE source code is open source and available under the MIT license at [https://github.com/ethereum/remix-project](https://github.com/ethereum/remix-project). Your rights to the open-source components are governed by that license.

The Remix brand, logo, website design, and all proprietary content on remix.live are the exclusive property of Remix Labs, UG. You may not use our trademarks, trade names, or logos without our prior written consent.
You retain full ownership of any smart contracts, code, or content you create using the Services.

All purchases of Remix Pro subscriptions and AI credit top-ups are processed by **Paddle.com** (Paddle), who acts as the **Merchant of Record** for all transactions. When you complete a purchase, your contractual relationship for payment is with Paddle. Paddle's own [Terms of Service](https://www.paddle.com/legal/terms) and [Privacy Policy](https://www.paddle.com/legal/privacy) also apply to your transaction.

Paddle is responsible for collecting and remitting applicable sales tax and VAT on all transactions. The price displayed at checkout is the final amount you will be charged, inclusive of any applicable taxes.
Accepted payment methods are determined by Paddle and may include major credit cards and other supported payment methods. All prices are listed in US Dollars (USD) unless otherwise indicated.
For billing inquiries or issues with a charge, you may contact Paddle support directly or reach us at [remix@remixlabs.live](mailto:remix@remixlabs.live).
Remix Pro is available as a recurring subscription. Current plans include:

items: **Starter** — $9.90 per month
**Pro** — $19.90 per month
**6-Month Plan** — discounted rate billed every 6 months

blocks.text: **Auto-renewal.** Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing cycle at the then-current price. You authorize Paddle to charge your payment method on each renewal date unless you cancel before the renewal.

**Billing cycle.** Your billing cycle begins on the date of your first purchase and renews on the same date each month (or applicable period). You will receive access to Remix Pro features immediately upon successful payment.

**Price changes.** We may change subscription prices at any time. We will give you at least 30 days' notice of any price change via email. Continued use of the subscription after the price change takes effect constitutes acceptance of the new price.
**Gift credits.** Certain subscription plans include a one-time gift credit on the first billing month. Gift credits are non-transferable and expire if unused within 12 months.
In addition to subscription plans, you may purchase AI credits as a one-time top-up. Credits are deducted as you use AI-powered features within the Remix IDE.
AI credit top-ups are available in fixed amounts ($10, $25, $50, $100). Credits are added to your account balance immediately upon successful payment.

items: AI credits have no expiry date while your account remains active.
AI credits are non-transferable and have no cash value.
Top-up purchases are final. Unused credits are not refundable except as required by applicable law.
Credits are consumed in order of purchase (oldest first).

blocks.text: We reserve the right to adjust the AI credit cost of specific operations as underlying model costs change. We will communicate significant changes in advance.
You may cancel your Remix Pro subscription at any time through your Account Settings or by contacting us at [remix@remixlabs.live](mailto:remix@remixlabs.live).

Upon cancellation, your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle. You will not be charged for the next billing cycle. Access to Remix Pro features will end when the current billing period expires.
We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your access to the Services immediately, without prior notice, if you violate these Terms or engage in any prohibited activities.
Our full Refund Policy is available at [https://remix.live/refundpolicy](/refundpolicy). The key points are:

items: Monthly subscription fees are **non-refundable** as a general rule.
No prorated refunds are issued for unused days in a billing period.
In the event of a documented technical failure on our end lasting more than 48 consecutive hours, we may issue a credit or refund at our sole discretion.
Refunds will not be granted where more than 25% of the monthly AI credit allocation has been consumed.
AI credit top-up purchases are final and non-refundable.
If you have a billing dispute, please contact us before initiating a chargeback.

blocks.text: You agree not to use the Services to:

items: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Infringe the intellectual property rights of any third party
Reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract source code from any proprietary components of the Services
Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or excessively query the Services without our prior written consent
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any systems or networks associated with the Services
Share, resell, or sublicense your Remix Pro subscription credentials
Use the AI features to generate content that is illegal, harmful, or violates our Acceptable Use Policy
Engage in any activity that disrupts or interferes with the Services or servers

blocks.text: Violation of these restrictions may result in immediate termination of your account without refund.

THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, REMIX LABS, UG DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

We do not warrant that the Services will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. AI-generated outputs are provided for informational purposes and should not be relied upon as professional legal, financial, or security advice.
Smart contracts deployed using the Remix IDE are your sole responsibility. We strongly recommend thorough testing and independent security audits before deploying to mainnet.

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, REMIX LABS, UG AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF OR INABILITY TO USE THE SERVICES.

Our total cumulative liability to you for any claims arising from or related to these Terms or the Services shall not exceed the greater of (a) the amounts you paid to us in the 12 months preceding the claim, or (b) €100.
Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain types of liability. In such cases, our liability will be limited to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

These Terms and any dispute arising from or relating to them or the Services shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the **Federal Republic of Germany**, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of **Berlin, Germany**, unless mandatory consumer protection laws in your country of residence require otherwise.

If you are a consumer resident in the European Union, you may also have the right to submit a complaint to the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform at [https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr](https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr).

We may update these Terms from time to time. When we make material changes, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page and, where appropriate, notify you by email or through the Services.

Your continued use of the Services after the effective date of any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you must stop using the Services and cancel any active subscription.
If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
**Remix Labs, UG**
Oranienstrasse 6, 10997 Berlin, Germany
[remix@remixlabs.live](mailto:remix@remixlabs.live)
